---
id: rebuild-navidrome
title: "Rebuild Navidrome library"
description: "Performs a full rebuild/resync of the Navidrome music library, clearing existing data. Returns an HTML fragment."
sidebar_label: "Rebuild Navidrome library"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true

sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Rebuild Navidrome library"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/preferences/navidrome/rebuild"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Performs a full rebuild/resync of the Navidrome music library, clearing existing data. Returns an HTML fragment.

  parameters={undefined}
>
